active_project.name: customer-data-pipeline
active_project.goal: Build a reliable, auditable customer data pipeline that unifies product event streams and CRM records into a single warehouse model.
success_criteria: Daily sync success rate >= 99% with automated retry and exponential backoff.
Warehouse core models pass >= 30 dbt tests with zero critical failures.
End-to-end latency for priority streams <= 15 minutes during working hours.
Data lineage documented with reversible steps and an on-call runbook available.
execution_tasks: Set up ingestion connectors for CRM and product events with idempotent upserts.
Design staging -> core warehouse models with clear primary keys and SCD logic.
Implement retry/backoff and circuit breaker for vendor API rate limits.
Add monitoring for sync success, latency, and schema drift with alert routing.
Create on-call runbook and document lineage for critical tables.

today_facts: CRM OAuth token rotated; new token expires 2026-05-10.
Events backfill for 2025 Q4 completed to 98%; final batch queued.
Vendor API returned multiple 429s between 10:00-11:00; backoff engaged.
dbt tests: 2 warnings, 0 errors on staging models; investigate nulls in email field.
notes: Risk: vendor API rate limits during peak hours. Also monitor elevated latency during indexing jobs and coordinate with vendor support if 429 bursts persist.
